title: astragalus oreganus
intro: Astragalus oreganus is a perennial herbaceous plant belonging to the legume family, native to the southwestern United States and northern Mexico. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The plant is believed to offer various health benefits, such as boosting the immune system, reducing stress and fatigue, and improving cardiovascular health. Astragalus oreganus can be prepared as an herbal supplement in capsule or tablet form, or as a tea by infusing the dried roots and stems in hot water.
